root_cause: Designer agent declared artifacts that don't physically exist on filesystem

diagnosis.description: The designer_01 agent produced a result.json claiming to have created 9 artifacts (AGENT.md and config.json files for analyst_01, translator_01, reviewer_01, debug_01 workers), but only 2 files actually exist (design_package.json and DESIGN_SUMMARY.md). When flow_runner attempted to register the declared but non-existent files, artifact_store.register() failed with FileNotFoundError.
evidence: ls verification shows only 2 files exist
Error traceback points to artifact_store.py:31 FileNotFoundError
All 7 missing files are inside non-existent subdirectories (designer_01/analyst_01/, designer_01/translator_01/, etc.)

fix_applied.description: Corrected the result.json to only declare artifacts that actually exist

design_package.json.completeness: contains full workflow YAML, worker specs, DAG, summary

next_steps: Re-trigger artifact registration for design_workflow step
Verify step status transitions from 'failed' to 'completed'
Proceed to create_workflow_files step (next in dependency chain)
prevention_measures: Add artifact pre-flight check to designer agent prompt
Implement file existence validation before result JSON finalization
Add DEBUG logging to artifact_store.register() showing validated files
